message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam participantStyle rectangle

participant "main" as main
participant "OsScheduler" as OsScheduler
participant "Semaphore" as Semaphore
participant "TaskA" as TaskA
participant "TaskB" as TaskB
participant "System" as System

main -> OsScheduler : startOS
activate OsScheduler

OsScheduler -> TaskA : launch
activate TaskA
TaskA -> Semaphore : waitSemaphore
activate Semaphore
Semaphore -> System : callSystem
activate System
System -> System : setJump(buf)
System -> OsScheduler : reportSystemCall
deactivate System
deactivate Semaphore
OsScheduler -> OsScheduler : saveTaskContext
deactivate TaskA

OsScheduler -> TaskB : launch
activate TaskB
TaskB -> Semaphore : waitSemaphore
activate Semaphore
Semaphore -> System : callSystem
activate System
System -> OsScheduler : reportSystemCall
deactivate System
deactivate Semaphore
OsScheduler -> OsScheduler : saveTaskContext
deactivate TaskB

OsScheduler -> TaskA : launch
activate TaskA
deactivate OsScheduler

@enduml
```
